question: Who directed the movie that had the biggest US opening weekend of the first half of 2026?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
Toy Story 5, which opened with $160 million domestically in June 2026, had the biggest US opening weekend of the first half of 2026 ([Variety](https://variety.com/2026/film/box-office/toy-story-5-box-office-opening-weekend-record-franchise-1236786574/); [AMC](https://investor.amctheatres.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/429/amc-theatres-enjoys-its-busiest-weekend-of-2026-in-the-united-states-as-toy-story-5-debuts-with-the-biggest-opening-weekend-box-office-of-the-year)).

Toy Story 5 was directed by **Andrew Stanton**, the veteran Pixar filmmaker known for directing Finding Nemo and WALL-

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: **Andrew Stanton** directed *Toy Story 5*, which recorded the biggest U.S./domestic opening weekend of the first half of 2026 with **$160 million**. ([Variety](https://variety.com/2026/film/box-office/toy-story-5-box-office-opening-weekend-record-franchise-1236786574/), [Polygon](https://www.polygon.com/toy-story-5-director-interview/))
